Defendants Jennifer Kwok And California Financial Mortgage Corporation'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS JENNIFER KWOK AND CALIFORNIA FINANCIAL MORTGAGE CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled as to allegations for resulting trust and accounting in 3rd, 4th, and 8th causes of action. Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to constructive trust allegations in 3rd, 4th, and 8th causes of action. If plaintiffs want to state a cause of action for constructive trust, they must plead facts showing that the property was acquired through a wrongful act, such as fraud or breach of a fiduciary duty. Civil Code section 2224. They also must plead specifically who committed this wrongful act. Demurrer overruled as to the 6th cause of action for financial elder abuse. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
